title: malaxis aurata
intro: Malaxis aurata, also known as the golden adder's-mouth orchid, is a terrestrial orchid species native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to provide several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions. Malaxis aurata can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, with its roots and leaves being used to make herbal teas, tinctures, and salves.
